arts.ttl: Champions League Live: Latest score, team news and updates as Atletico Madrid vs Real Madrid headlines evening games with Arsenal and Aston Villa also in action
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport's live blog for the latest score, team news and updates from the Champions League games of Atletico Madrid vs Real Madrid, Arsenal vs PSV and Aston Villa vs Club Brugge.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa eyeing summer move for Real Sociedad star
arts.sum: Aston Villa have regularly looked to the La Liga market in the last couple of years, and they could do so again to address the right-back position in Unai Emery’s squad. Despite having signed Andres Garcia from Levante during the winter transfer window, it appears that they have plans to make another signing in the […] The post Aston Villa eyeing summer move for Real Sociedad star appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Man Utd transfer news: Marcus Rashford to embarrass Red Devils one last time
arts.sum: Manchester United ’s Marcus Rashford woes are not over despite successfully loaning the player to Aston Villa at the end of the transfer window. United to bank just €24m from Rashford sale

arts.ttl: Aston Villa vs Club Brugge LIVE match updates and team news from Champions League clash
arts.sum: Villa last hosted a Belgian side in any European competition back in April 1982 in the European Cup semi-final against Anderlecht, winning 1-0 with a goal from Tony Morley on their way to winning the trophy. Unai Emery's host the Belgian champions with a two-goal lead after winning 3-1 at the Jan Breydel Stadium last Tuesday.

arts.ttl: What Prince Williams did with Aston Villa players before Champions League tie with Club Brugge
arts.sum: Prince William paid a visit to Aston Villa training ground Bodymoor Heath on Tuesday ahead of Unai Emery men's Champions League second-leg clash with Club Brugge. Latest Aston Villa news as Unai Emery's men receive a special visit ahead of tonight's huge Champions League clash with Club Brugge

arts.ttl: Revenge in the air as Aston Villa better equipped to do what Liverpool couldn't
arts.sum: Join our Aston Villa WhatsApp group and get the latest breaking news, interviews and opinion sent straight to your phone, plus matchday team news and live updates of all the action. However, the key to thwarting PSG is control of midfield, and the likes of Boubacar Kamara, Youri Tielemans and John McGinn, with Jacob Ramsey and Morgan Rogers dropping back to help when needed, are unlikely to cede possession in the way Liverpool did, both at Anfield and at the Parc des Princes.

arts.ttl: Can Marco Asensio play against PSG in Champions League? Aston Villa loan explained
arts.sum: Marco Asensio joined Aston Villa on loan from Paris Saint-Germain during the winter transfer window and now the two clubs could end up facing off in the Champions League
